text:
Koroabde (コロアブデ, Koroabude) is a former Royal Bodyguard for Prince Salé-salé, serving also as a spy for Queen Tang Zhao Li. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 36, Chapter 374 

Appearance

Koroabde seems to be a man of tall stature. He has short, somewhat curly fair hair and a bulbous nose. As a Royal Bodyguard, he wears a black suit and a tie.

Personality

Under the influence of Prince Salé-salé's Guardian Spirit Beast, he developed admiration, envy, and loyalty towards the prince, though immediately after the Guardian Spirit Beast was exorcised, he thought the prince is weird again. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 37, Chapter 381 

Plot

Succession Contest arc

On the second day of the voyage, Koroabde guards Prince Salé-salé's bedroom with Rihan for 16 hours. Unbeknownst to him, he repeatedly inhales the fumes of the prince's Guardian Spirit Beast the entire time. Roughly 70 hours from the first inhalation, he begins to feel admiration, envy, and loyalty for Prince Salé-salé. He shares his newfound admiration for the prince with Rihan: this is due to a small clone of the prince's Guardian Spirit Beast forming above his head. When, moments later, Rihan unleashes Predator, Koroabde questions what he just said and begins to think that Salé-salé is weird again.
